findings.description: R3 fix confirmed correct: the 7-principle AI table (table::p153::5) is present with all 7 rows matching the image bullet list exactly: 人間中心の原則, 教育・リテラシーの原則, プライバシー確保の原則, セキュリティ確保の原則, 公正競争確保の原則, 公平性・説明責任及び透明性の原則, イノベーションの原則.
Business terms table rows for トレーサビリティ and POSシステム match image table content. Minor zh wording variation between term entity and table entity (both renderings are semantically equivalent).

reviewer_notes: All 6 entities are present and accurate. The key R3 fix — adding the 7-principle AI table — is verified against the image bullet list; all 7 principle names are correctly captured in jp, zh, and en. Section heading, exam tip figure, two term entities, and two table entities all match visible page content. No missing significant visual content. Zero high or med severity findings — PASS.
